perturbation.original_text: All Confidential Information disclosed under this Agreement shall be and remain the property of the disclosing Party and nothing contained in this Agreement shall be construed as granting or conferring any rights to such Confidential Information on the other Party. The Recipient shall honor any request from the disclosing Party to promptly return or destroy all copies of Confidential Information disclosed under this Agreement and all notes related to such Confidential Information. The Parties agree that the disclosing Party will suffer irreparable injury if its Non-Disclosure Agreement -Page 2 of 3- CONFIDENTIAL Confidential Information is made public, released to a third party, or otherwise disclosed in breach of this Agreement and that the disclosing Party shall be entitled to obtain injunctive relief against a threatened breach or continuation of any such breach and, in the event of such breach, an award of actual and exemplary damages from any court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.changed_text: All Confidential Information disclosed under this Agreement shall be and remain the property of the disclosing Party and nothing contained in this Agreement shall be construed as granting or conferring any rights to such Confidential Information on the other Party. The Parties agree that the disclosing Party will suffer irreparable injury if its Non-Disclosure Agreement -Page 2 of 3- CONFIDENTIAL Confidential Information is made public, released to a third party, or otherwise disclosed in breach of this Agreement and that the disclosing Party shall be entitled to obtain injunctive relief against a threatened breach or continuation of any such breach and, in the event of such breach, an award of actual and exemplary damages from any court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the obligation of The Recipient to honor any request from the disclosing Party to promptly return or destroy all copies of Confidential Information, it now means Recipient doesn't have to return or destroy all copies of Confidential Information. This creates a contradiction within the section, which establishes the disclosing party's property rights but lacks a mechanism for enforcing the return of that property.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All Confidential Information disclosed under this Agreement shall be and remain the property of the disclosing Party and nothing contained in this Agreement shall be construed as granting or conferring any rights to such Confidential Information on the other Party. The Parties agree that the disclosing Party will suffer irreparable injury if its Non-Disclosure Agreement -Page 2 of 3- CONFIDENTIAL Confidential Information is made public, released to a third party, or otherwise disclosed in breach of this Agreement and that the disclosing Party shall be entitled to obtain injunctive relief against a threatened breach or continuation of any such breach and, in the event of such breach, an award of actual and exemplary damages from any court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the Recipient's obligation to return or destroy Confidential Information, which directly contradicts the principle that the Confidential Information remains the property of the disclosing party, as stated in both the changed text and the contradicted text. Without the mechanism to enforce the return or destruction of confidential information, the disclosing party's property rights are significantly undermined, leading to an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The terms of this Agreement shall not be construed to limit either Party’s right to develop independently or acquire products without use of the other Party’s Confidential Information. The disclosing party acknowledges that the Recipient may currently or in the future be developing information internally, or receiving information from other parties, that is similar to the Confidential Information. Nothing in this Agreement will prohibit the Recipient from developing or having developed for it products, concepts, systems or techniques that are similar to or compete with the products, concepts, systems or techniques contemplated by or embodied in the Confidential Information provided that the Recipient does not violate any of its obligations under this Agreement in connection with such development.
perturbation.changed_text: The terms of this Agreement shall not be construed to limit either Party’s right to develop independently or acquire products without use of the other Party’s Confidential Information. The disclosing party acknowledges that the Recipient may currently or in the future be developing information internally, or receiving information from other parties, that is similar to the Confidential Information. Nothing in this Agreement will prohibit the Recipient from developing or having developed for it products, concepts, systems or techniques that are similar to or compete with the products, concepts, systems or techniques contemplated by or embodied in the Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting the clause 'provided that the Recipient does not violate any of its obligations under this Agreement in connection with such development,' the Recipient is no longer explicitly bound by the obligations of the NDA while developing similar products. This creates an internal contradiction. The introduction of the NDA aimed to prevent disclosure of confidential information, yet this omission allows the Recipient to violate the NDA without consequence under this section, contradicting the overall purpose of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The terms of this Agreement shall not be construed to limit either Party’s right to develop independently or acquire products without use of the other Party’s Confidential Information. The disclosing party acknowledges that the Recipient may currently or in the future be developing information internally, or receiving information from other parties, that is similar to the Confidential Information. Nothing in this Agreement will prohibit the Recipient from developing or having developed for it products, concepts, systems or techniques that are similar to or compete with the products, concepts, systems or techniques contemplated by or embodied in the Confidential Information.
perturbation.justification: The changed text omits the clause 'provided that the Recipient does not violate any of its obligations under this Agreement in connection with such development.' This creates a contradiction because without this clause, the Recipient is no longer explicitly bound by the obligations of the NDA while developing similar products, effectively negating the original intent of the NDA as explained in the perturbation explanation. The contradicted text which is the same as the original, assumes that the recipient is still bound by obligations. Thus, the change allows for potential NDA violations without consequence, contradicting the fundamental purpose and terms of the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of two (2) years from the Effective Date unless otherwise terminated by either Party giving notice to the other of its desire to terminate this Agreement. The requirement to protect Confidential Information disclosed under this Agreement shall survive termination of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of two (2) years from the Effective Date unless otherwise terminated by either Party giving notice to the other of its desire to terminate this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'The requirement to protect Confidential Information disclosed under this Agreement shall survive termination of this Agreement.', it creates a contradiction regarding the lasting effect of the confidentiality obligations. Without the survival clause, the obligation to protect Confidential Information ceases upon termination, this means information disclosed towards the end of the agreement could be revealed soon after without repercussions. This is against the original NDA aim to protect the info.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of two (2) years from the Effective Date unless otherwise terminated by either Party giving notice to the other of its desire to terminate this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the requirement to protect Confidential Information disclosed under this Agreement shall survive termination of this Agreement. The changed text removes this survival clause. The contradicted text is the original agreement which outlines the terms of the agreement. By removing the survival clause, there is now a contradiction. If the agreement is terminated, there is no longer any obligation to protect confidential information which goes against the original purpose of the NDA.
